title: Is this type of board view(or something similar) possible with current features?

posts.author: BrandonTGI (Brandon Buchanan)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday dot com Labor Map mock up1920×1036 180 KB

posts.author: BrandonTGI (Brandon Buchanan)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have installers in our building that we schedule x2 projects in the AM and x2 in the PM.

The projects are sometimes the same and sometimes different so editable text would make the most sense.

And we work 5 days a week so being able to toggle off the weekend would be great!
